benefits.description: Strong appetite suppression making it difficult to meet protein macros

protocol_notes: Protocol: 2 scoops whey protein with water (50g protein, 260 cal). Access to Fairlife 30g shakes at work (2 per day). Meals: 80% protein, 10% carbs, 10% veggies. Examples include shrimp/rice/broccoli, lean ground beef/potatoes/broccoli, chicken/rice/corn. Occasional cheat meal (e.g., Chick-fil-A nuggets). Notes difficulty with appetite suppression and reflects on not leveraging appetite control before starting tirzepatide.
